headline: KeyBank Foundation Invests $240,000 in YWCA North Central Indiana to Support Women's Education and Economic Advancement
summary: Grant funds will be used to support YWCA's Strengthening Communities Initiative CLEVELAND, OH / ACCESS Newswire / March 16, 2026 / The KeyBank Foundation announced an investment of $240,000 in YWCA North Central Indiana's Strengthening Communities ...
